summary: Backend regression for Daily Basket grocery app. 23/23 pytest tests passed covering auth (admin login, customer register/login, /auth/me, invalid creds), categories (8 seeded), products (22+ seeded, get-by-id, admin RBAC for create, toggle active), orders (place/list/admin-list/RBAC, status update, tracking with rider coords/progress/eta/timeline, bill with shop info), admin reports (dashboard fields + balance-sheet days/summary + customer 403), and shop-settings (get + admin update + customer 403).

minor.issue: include_inactive query param works but no admin-only restriction; any anonymous client could list inactive products by passing include_inactive=true. Not in scope, but worth gating behind admin.
Returns {ok:true} only; does not return the updated order. UI may need an extra GET. Cosmetic.
Allows role='staff' to be self-assigned via the request body. Should restrict staff/admin role creation to admins only.

action_items: Consider gating include_inactive=true on /api/products behind admin auth.
Restrict role=staff/admin assignment in /api/auth/register to admin-only (currently any caller can register as staff).
Optional: PATCH /api/orders/{id}/status could return the updated order document to save a round-trip.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject this combo. If credentials/cookies are needed, set explicit origins.
JWT_SECRET is read at import time via os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] which is fine, but consider rotating and ensuring it's set in .env (otherwise startup crashes).
Tracking computes elapsed using datetime.fromisoformat on stored ISO strings; this works with timezone-aware values (now_iso uses UTC), good.
register accepts data.role; should hard-default to 'customer' regardless of payload to prevent privilege escalation.
seed_data_creation: Customer 8888888888/test123 created (idempotent: re-uses if existing). One COD test order placed and status updated to 'preparing'. Test products created and deleted via cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable. Tests are idempotent — customer login is reused if exists. BASE_URL hardcoded to https://daily-mart-12.preview.emergentagent.com (matches frontend EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). Note: tracking simulation is mocked (no real GPS). Payments are mocked: 'cod' -> payment_status=pending, others -> paid (no real Stripe/Razorpay wiring).
